{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Servants of Ruin
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Servants of Ruin]] struck down the [[Great Bison]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Servants of Ruin]] are a group that [[Dross]] has met.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
